note: Shared vocabulary for all study tools in this project. Do not reword an original once written. Corrections go in the corrected/correctedDate fields; the original is always kept.

terms.original: "From above."
(Acts 3:21) A critical reality-establisher: the restoration of all things — receiver repair at creation scale.
Immersion in the sound of sustained prayer — not physical water.
Intimate communion; being known. "I never knew you" = "we never had intimate communion."
The effortless extension of what is already true — the book's most practical tool.
Pruning — restorative, not torture.

Epistemic, not moral. Light = known and manifest things; darkness = hidden things. 2 Corinthians 4:6 fuses light with the water-flood imagery through Habakkuk 2:14's phrase — "the knowledge of the glory."

Root: Latin mercēs, "wages, price," from merx, "goods" — the same family as merchant, commerce, market. Rooted in exchange; the Christian development made it the gift to those from whom no requital can be expected — the exchange that dissolves the ledger. KAT reading: MERCY = "I in you and you in me" — the exchange perfected into oneness. Anchor: the Mercy Seat (Hebrew kapporeth; Exodus 25:22, "there I will meet with you") — mercy named as the meeting-place of the presence, made architectural. Kosmos reception: mercy = "you deserve a thumping but I'll withhold it" — judgment management; the symptom of a world that missed oneness.
Going beyond the mind of man into the mind of Christ.
The nervous system as antenna — the receiver.
The internal olive press extracting the oil.

Intimacy specifically — not mere presence. Ginosko; being known. The olive dies to itself to yield a categorically different substance — real transformation through death and crushing. The crushing (thlipsis) presses out the oil. The ten virgins: oil is necessary but not sufficient.
The ongoing cyclical movement mastered by "Prophets at the Gate."
(Matthew 19:28; Titus 3:5) A critical reality-establisher: restoration and new birth fused in one word.
Spiritual bankruptcy; with kenosis, the entry point into metanoia.

The neutral idea-to-thing process — not only the true actualization. Two forms: the one Heavenly Reality (true actualization) versus countless shifting Kosmos realities — shared hallucinations believed into "worlds," millions of shifting shades and shadows, subcultural worlds people move between across a life. The shifting quality is itself diagnostic of the Kosmos: the real thing does not shift.
A one-time, unmistakable threshold — the end of spectatorship. Framed as promise, not verdict.
Kosmos striving; coercion.
The beast — the Kosmos in liquid form. Habakkuk 2:14: the saturating presence drowning the beast.

Root: Greek hamartia, "to miss the mark" — an archery term; Hebrew chata, likewise "to miss." Sin at root is a miss, not a crime. KAT reading: the mark is the Highest Point of heaven; sin is the aim going sideways — toward the False Summits, the Kosmos — instead of up to the Gate. Kosmos reception: "sin" = wrong behavior — but behavior is the downstream symptom of the miss, not the miss itself.
Observer and observed merge.
A healed, active vessel who participates in the divine nature rather than spectating.

Always written TENDER MERCY, never bare "mercy" — the reinforce-by-renaming device. Root: Hebrew rachamim, from rechem = womb — womb-compassion, a mother's cherishing of the child within her: the most literal "I in you and you in me" image. "Tender mercies" appears about ten times in the Psalms, plus Proverbs 12:10; in the NT, Luke 1:78 and James 5:11. Two roots converge — mercēs (exchange perfected into oneness) and rachamim (womb, tender union) — and both flee the courtroom.
The same pressure as thlipsis, leaned on hard — testing, discipline, suffering. Kept as its own entry for now.
Declaring God's presence to all creation; it triggers the Wind.
The pressure. The Kosmos's neediness pressing you to believe in it — the inner olive press. Leaned on hard enough, it becomes testing, discipline, suffering. The press is what extracts the oil.
The result of the validation complex.
The Breath (physical, involuntary) plus the Resonance (inner conviction) — dual haptic feedback, used as a diagnostic.
Saturating presence — presence at a concentration that cannot be ignored. Flood-stage versus ambient humidity.
